🔴 **HEARTBEAT ESCALATION — Critical Agents**

**Check time:** 2026-03-13 17:15 UTC (12:15 PM America/Chicago)  
**Threshold:** >30 minutes since last heartbeat

### Status
- **d1_ceo:** 🔴 **STALE** — last heartbeat/session update ~**374 min** ago
- **d1_cto:** 🔴 **NO RECENT HEARTBEAT DATA** (no session heartbeat record found)
- **shared_master_orchestrator:** ✅ Healthy (current)

### Escalation Trigger
Immediate escalation condition met (**critical agent stale/missing >30 min**).
